page_metadata.biotools__summary: Produces a GFF3 file that clusters a list of transcripts using a sliding window. Cluster the data into regions (defined by size and overlap with next region) and keep only highest peaks.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Produces a GFF3 file that clusters a list of transcripts using a sliding window. Cluster the data into regions (defined by size and overlap with next region) and keep only highest peaks.
